faqs.question: What is NOVA's return policy?
faqs.answer: NOVA offers a 30-day hassle-free return policy. Items must be unused, unworn, and in original packaging. Skincare and makeup items are final sale once opened for hygiene reasons, unless defective.

faqs.question: How long does standard shipping take?
faqs.answer: Standard shipping takes 5-7 business days. Express shipping (2-3 days) is available for $9.99. Orders over $50 qualify for free standard shipping. International orders may take 10-14 business days.

faqs.question: Do you ship internationally?
faqs.answer: Yes! NOVA ships to 14 countries including US, UK, CA, AU, DE, FR, IN, SG, AE, NZ, IE, NL, SE, NO, and DK. International shipping rates are calculated at checkout.

faqs.question: How does the NOVA loyalty program work?
faqs.answer: Earn 1 point per $1 spent. Bronze (0-499 pts): 5% off. Silver (500-1499 pts): 10% off + free shipping. Gold (1500-4999 pts): 15% off + early access. Platinum (5000+ pts): 20% off + personal stylist.

faqs.question: Are NOVA products cruelty-free?
faqs.answer: Yes, all NOVA products are 100% cruelty-free. We never test on animals and are certified by Leaping Bunny. Over 60% of our range is also vegan-friendly, clearly labelled on each product page.

faqs.question: How do I find my correct clothing size?
faqs.answer: Use our size guide: XS (UK 6-8), S (UK 8-10), M (UK 10-12), L (UK 12-14), XL (UK 14-16), XXL (UK 16-18). Measure your bust, waist, and hips and compare to the size chart. If between sizes, size up for comfort.

faqs.question: How do I find my shoe size?
faqs.answer: NOVA footwear follows EU sizing: 35 (UK 2.5), 36 (UK 3.5), 37 (UK 4), 38 (UK 5), 39 (UK 6), 40 (UK 6.5), 41 (UK 7.5), 42 (UK 8). Measure your foot length in cm and match to the chart.

faqs.question: What payment methods does NOVA accept?
faqs.answer: NOVA accepts Visa, Mastercard, Amex, PayPal, Apple Pay, Google Pay, and Klarna (Buy Now Pay Later in 3 interest-free instalments).
